name: LedPipelines
description: A library for building and composing complex LED effects. Renders through a pluggable output backend (FastLED, ESPHome, ...) and has no hard dependency on any LED driver.
keywords: led pipelines, ledpipelines, pipelines, led effects, effects, fast led pipelines, fast led effects

build.comment: src/main.cpp is a hardware demo sketch (its own setup()/loop(), includes FastLED), not library code. Exclude it so consumers' LDF builds don't try to compile it. export.exclude only affects packaging, not a local symlink/checkout build, so the filter is needed here too.

examples.name: 002. Cycling Through Red Green and Blue Colors
